creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
The implementation of -6 is inconsistent when using -i and/or -o from -t. With -t, -6 is IPv6 only whereas without it ipfstat lists IPv4 only. The width of the address field shouldn't be an issue.

There is an ncurses issue when the terminal isn't wide enough.

I'll put these on my list of things to fix.
